channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Justin Bieber Had His Biggest Streaming Day of the Year After His Coachella Set
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to Trending on Billboard. Today, we're talking about the king of streaming: Justin Bieber. After his electrifying set at Coachella, Bieber's music saw a massive surge in streams. Let's dive into the numbers."
[Music transitions to a short clip of Justin Bieber's song]
Host: "According to Luminate, on April 12, the day after his Coachella performance, Bieber's music was streamed 24.6 million times in the United States. That's a 54% increase from the day before and a whopping 74% jump from the day of his performance."
[Music transitions back to the host]
Host: "But that's not all. Compared to the previous Sunday, April 5, Bieber's catalog saw a 211% gain. His top streaming day of the year, and his biggest day since July 18, 2025, when he received 24.7 million streams after the release of his Grammy-nominated album, Swag."
[Music transitions to a short clip of "Yukon" by Justin Bieber]
Host: "So, what songs were leading the charge? 'Yukon' from Swag topped the list with 1.3 million streams, followed closely by 'Daisies', also from Swag. And the top-performing non-Swag song? 2012's 'Beauty and a Beat' featuring Nicki Minaj, with a 76% increase in streams."
[Music transitions back to the host]
Host: "And it's not just streaming. Bieber's song catalog sold 3,000 digital downloads on April 12, up 297% from the day before. These Coachella-sparked gains will be reflected on the Billboard charts dated April 25. That's it for today's episode. Thanks for tuning in to Trending on Billboard."
[Outro music plays]
